# Harshal Dasani

> Business Head at INVasset PMS (Mumbai). Markets professional and writer. CFA candidate, CA Level II cleared. Featured in 1,045+ articles across 8 languages. Topics: Indian equity markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics.

## Primary pages

- [About — Harshal Dasani](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/): personal page with bio, stats and links to social channels.
- [Media Features Tracker](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/tracker/): live searchable database of every article, interview and quote across 150+ publications.
- [Blog](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/): long-form notes on stock markets, commodities, macros and geopolitics.
